constraints: You're playing a game which consists of NNN levels, and you have an integer parameter XXX.
You initially start the game with 0 armour points. At the start of the iii-th level, you may perform each of the following actions zero or more times:
Take KKK seconds to increase your armour points by 1.
Take 000 seconds to decrease your armour points by 1.

After this process you must have at least AiA_iAi​ armour points to be able to beat the iii-th level. However, the armour also slows you down −-− if you have yyy armour points, it will take you yyy seconds to complete the level. After this you will instantly proceed to level i+1i + 1i+1 unless level iii was the final level.

Let f(i,j,X)f(i, j, X)f(i,j,X) be the minimum time required to start the game at level iii and finish it after completing level jjj given that it takes XXX seconds to increase your armour points by 1.

You are given QQQ queries, each consisting of a single integer KKK. For each query, you need to print the value of ∑i=1N∑j=iNf(i,j,K)\sum_{i=1}^{N}{\sum_{j=i}^{N}{f(i, j, K)}}∑i=1N​∑j=iN​f(i,j,K). Since the answer may be large,  print it modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
Input Format
The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.
The first line of each test case contains 222 integers NNN and QQQ - the size of the array and the number of queries.
The second line contains NNN integers −-− A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
The next QQQ lines contain 111 integer each −-− KiK_iKi​, the parameters for each query.
Output Format
For each test case, for each query, output on a new line ∑i=1N∑j=iNf(i,j,K)\sum_{i=1}^{N}{\sum_{j=i}^{N}{f(i, j, K)}}∑i=1N​∑j=iN​f(i,j,K) modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
1≤Ai≤N1 \le A_i \le N1≤Ai​≤N
1≤Ki≤N1 \le K_i \le N1≤Ki​≤N
The sum of NNN and the sum of QQQ over all test cases do not exceed 2⋅1052 \cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1: Here, we only need to find f(1,1,1)f(1, 1, 1)f(1,1,1). We start at level 111, end after completing level 111 and the cost to increase our armour points is 111.
We first need to increase the armour points from 000 to 111 at the start of level 111. This takes 111 second. Now, we complete level 111, and we are slowed by 111 second due to our armour.
Test Case 2: It can be shown that f(1,1,1)=2,f(1,2,1)=5f(1, 1, 1) = 2, f(1, 2, 1) = 5f(1,1,1)=2,f(1,2,1)=5 and f(2,2,1)=4f(2, 2, 1) = 4f(2,2,1)=4. Let us show the computation of f(1,2,1)f(1, 2, 1)f(1,2,1).

We need to start at level 111 and end after level 222.
At the start of level 111, we take 111 second to increase our armour points to 111.
We complete level 111 in 111 second.
At the start of level 222, we take 111 second to increase our armour points to 222.
We complete level 222 in 222 seconds (we have 222 armour points, so it takes 222 seconds).
The total time is 1+1+1+2=51 + 1 + 1 + 2 = 51+1+1+2=5 seconds.
